center.name: 大巽他群岛
center.summary: 大巽他群岛是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联8种鸟类，包括喜馬拉雅中杜鵑、蓝喉蜂虎、大灰啄木鸟等8种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.evidence: It is found in south-eastern Asia and the Greater Sunda Islands

birds.evidence: It migrates to southeast Asia and the Greater Sunda Islands for the winter

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in the Greater Sundas, but it does not inhabit Bali

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Types of the Eurylaimidae|url=https://www.aviansystematics.org/uploads/downloads/103/file/ZV331_077-088.pdf|journal=Zoologische Verhandelingen|volume=331|pages=77–88 [80] |access-date=16 April 2022|archive-date=11 May 2021|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20210511015956/https://www.aviansystematics.org/uploads/downloads/103/file/ZV331_077-088.pdf|url-status=live}} }} The () is a species of bird in the typical broadbill family Eurylaimidae found in Mainland Southeast Asia and the Greater Sunda Islands

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found on the Malay Peninsula in southern Thailand and Peninsular Malaysia and in the Greater Sundas on Sumatra, Borneo and the Natuna Islands. It mainly occurs in tall, lowland forests and also in swamps and heath forest

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: They have a wide distribution ranging from southeastern China to the Greater Sundas Islands. The most concentrated distribution is found in Singapore, Malaysia, southern Cambodia, and southern Thailand. Other locations with greater dispersal include Borneo and Java. It is most widespread at low altitudes, between 0–670 m, but is known to occur up to 1,600 m. Their habitat includes a wide variety of flat plains, such as farmland, suburban gardens, riversides, dunes, and sandy clearings. In the winter, some blue-throated bee-eaters move to forest canopies and saltwater channels of mangrove forests. Unlike most bee-eaters which dig nest burrows in near-vertical sand cliffs, they often dig nest burrows nearly horizontally into flat ground. Colony sizes range from 50 to 200 pairs or living completely solitary in the open country
